angleToggle.label: Show start/end dates based on astrological angles

info.title: About Astro Events
info.description: Astro Events is a free app showing astrological events — moon phases, eclipses, equinoxes, and solstices — based on your location and timezone.

support.title: Support this project
support.description: If you enjoy the app, consider sending a donation via Revolut to

welcome.title: Welcome to Astro Events 🪐
welcome.description: A quick tour of what's new in v2. You can skip any time.

theme.title: Dark & light mode
theme.description: Toggle between dark and light themes to match your vibe.

language.title: Pick your language
language.description: Events and the interface translate into 40+ languages.

calendar.title: Subscribe to your calendar
calendar.description: Add a feed so events show up directly in your phone or desktop calendar.

location.title: Set your location
location.description: Events are calculated for your exact location and timezone — search a place or tap the target icon to use your current position.

navigation.title: Browse months
navigation.description: Step back and forward through months, or jump back to today.

events.title: Astrological events
events.description: Moon phases, eclipses, equinoxes, and solstices — with relative time and color-coding. Past events in the current month are dimmed.

welcome.title: Subscribe to your calendar
welcome.description: Add astro events directly to your calendar app — here's how.

url.title: Your calendar feed URL
url.description: Copy this URL and paste it into your phone or desktop calendar as a new subscription.

copy.title: One-tap copy
copy.description: Tap to copy the URL to your clipboard. Then paste it into Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or any app that accepts iCal feeds.
